summary: Completed comprehensive testing of POS system improvements including role-based access, clickable product grid, and vendedor role functionality. All backend APIs (26/26) and frontend features working correctly.
passed_tests: Admin login with full menu access (Dashboard, Productos, Ventas, Historial, Reportes)
Admin role badge displays in dark color
Vendedor role badge displays in green color
Vendedor only sees Ventas menu (other menus correctly hidden)
Vendedor route restrictions working (redirected to /ventas from admin pages)
Products display as clickable grid cards
Click on product adds 1 to cart successfully
Stock color indicators working (green for good stock)
Cart updates when products are added
Payment methods work (efectivo with change calculation)
Complete sale updates stock and shows receipt
All backend APIs working (26/26 tests passed)
New unit types (gramos, bolsas) supported in backend
